# Generated Files

This directory contains **auto-generated artifacts** derived from the Rust source code.

**Do NOT edit these files manually** - they will be overwritten.

## Source of Truth

The canonical source for dataset metadata is:

```
crates/anno/eval/dataset_registry.rs
```

The `define_datasets!` macro in that file generates all dataset-related code.

## Contents

| File | Generated By | Purpose |
|------|--------------|---------|
| `datasets_generated.json` | `cargo test -p anno --features eval generate_datasets_json -- --ignored` | Full JSON export for tooling |
| `datasets_generated.jsonl` | `cargo test -p anno --features eval generate_datasets_jsonl -- --ignored` | JSON Lines for streaming |
| `download_configs_generated.json` | `scripts/generate_download_configs.py` | Download URLs and config |
| `docs/generated/DATASETS_GENERATED.md` | `cargo test -p anno --features eval generate_datasets_markdown -- --ignored` | Human-readable registry snapshot |
| `docs/generated/dataset_catalog.html` | `python3 scripts/generate_catalog_html.py` | Searchable dataset catalog (HTML) |

### Legacy/Deprecated

| File | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| `datasets.toml` | **Deprecated** | JSON/JSONL are the current artifacts; a root-level `datasets.toml` is no longer generated in this repo |
| `generated_loader_stubs.rs` | Optional | Loader stub code generation |

## Regenerating

```bash
# Regenerate registry exports from Rust registry (derived artifacts)
cargo test -p anno --features eval generate_datasets_json -- --ignored
cargo test -p anno --features eval generate_datasets_jsonl -- --ignored
cargo test -p anno --features eval generate_datasets_markdown -- --ignored

# Regenerate download configs (uses datasets_generated.json as input)
python3 scripts/generate_download_configs.py \
    --input generated/datasets_generated.json \
    --output generated/download_configs_generated.json \
    --stats

# Regenerate searchable HTML catalog (reads datasets_generated.jsonl)
python3 scripts/generate_catalog_html.py

# Or do everything via just:
just regenerate-datasets
```

## Dataset count

Counts are intentionally not hard-coded here. Treat `docs/generated/DATASETS_GENERATED.md` as the
source of truth for the current “how many” snapshot.

## Architecture Note

The Rust codebase has two `DatasetId` enums (in `loader.rs` and `dataset_registry.rs`)
that are now largely synchronized. Prefer `dataset_registry.rs` for metadata and `loader.rs` for
“loadable” datasets.

## Why This Structure?

From `dataset_registry.rs`:

> "A single point of truth means a single point of maintenance."
>
> Instead of maintaining both a Rust enum AND a TOML file with a fragile
> `rust_variant` mapping, we define everything in Rust. These files are
> derived artifacts for documentation and tooling.
